title.en: The Rise of Small Language Models

summary.en: Efficiency-first model design is accelerating. Small language models are now delivering competitive task performance in domain workflows where latency, privacy, and cost are primary constraints.
summary.zh: 以效率优先的模型设计正在加速。小语言模型在延迟、隐私和成本受限的领域任务中，已经能提供具有竞争力的表现。

observations.en: Modern quantization allows smaller models to approach older large-model baselines.
observations.zh: 现代量化技术让小模型逐步逼近早期大模型的基线表现。

observations.en: Specialized distilled models are becoming common in productized coding workflows.
observations.zh: 面向具体任务蒸馏的专用模型正在产品化开发流程中普及。

observations.en: Local-first deployment is increasingly treated as an enterprise requirement.
observations.zh: 本地优先部署正越来越多地被视为企业级刚需。

quote.en: Optimization is the practical path to broad AI adoption.
quote.zh: 优化是推动 AI 广泛落地最现实的路径。

title.zh: 基准：SLM 在生产环境中的表现
指南：本地 LLM 部署
